sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106269" key="u(grotra/xhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑγρο-τράχηλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n106269.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with pliant neck,</tr_> prob. to be supplied in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
